recommendations.title: The Remarkable Life of Ibelin
recommendations.overview: The secret life of a young World of Warcraft gamer is vividly reimagined when his online friends contact his family after his death.

recommendations.title: Lover, Stalker, Killer
recommendations.overview: In this twisting documentary, a mechanic tries online dating for the first time and meets a woman who takes romantic obsession to a deadly extreme.

recommendations.title: No Other Land
recommendations.overview: This film made by a Palestinian-Israeli collective shows the destruction of the occupied West Bank's Masafer Yatta by Israeli soldiers and the alliance which develops between the Palestinian activist Basel and Israeli journalist Yuval.
recommendations.director: Hamdan Ballal, Basel Adra, Rachel Szor, Yuval Abraham

recommendations.title: Electric Boogaloo: The Wild, Untold Story of Cannon Films
recommendations.overview: A documentary about the rise and fall of the Cannon Film Group, the legendary independent film company helmed by Israeli cousins Menahem Golan and Yoram Globus.

recommendations.title: Waltz with Bashir
recommendations.overview: An Israeli film director interviews fellow veterans of the 1982 invasion of Lebanon to reconstruct his own memories of his term of service in that conflict.

recommendations.title: Shiny_Flakes: The Teenage Drug Lord
recommendations.overview: Max S. reveals how he built a drug empire from his childhood bedroom in this story that inspired the series "How to Sell Drugs Online."

recommendations.title: Synonyms
recommendations.overview: A young Israeli man absconds to Paris to flee his nationality, aided by his trusty Franco-Israeli dictionary.

recommendations.title: Heroin(e)
recommendations.overview: This documentary follows three women — a fire chief, a judge, and a street missionary — as they battle West Virginia's devastating opioid epidemic.

recommendations.title: Beware the Slenderman
recommendations.overview: In this horrifyingly modern fairytale lurks an online Boogeyman and two 12-year-old girls who would kill for him. The entrance to the internet quickly leads to its darkest basement. How responsible are our children for what they find there?

recommendations.title: Set It Up
recommendations.overview: Two overworked and underpaid assistants come up with a plan to get their bosses off their backs by setting them up with each other.
